name: Southern Hemisphere Mining Limited
summary: Southern Hemisphere Mining Limited, an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties primarily in Chile. The company explores for copper, gold, and lithium deposits. It primarily focuses on the Llahuin porphyry copper-gold project located to the north of Santiago; and the Los Pumas manganese project situated to the east of Arica, Chile. The company is based in Perth, Australia.
